mapper.sql: id, project_id, status, based_on_outline_version_id, summary_md, outline_context_md, cast(fixed_items_json as varchar) as fixed_items_json, cast(init_search_queries_json as varchar) as init_search_queries_json, cast(init_search_results_json as varchar) as init_search_results_json, cast(init_corpus_digest_json as varchar) as init_corpus_digest_json, cast(ai_questions_json as varchar) as ai_questions_json, cast(answers_json as varchar) as answers_json, created_at, updated_at
